---
title: "The Rev. Edward Clarke Lowe"
---

## The Rev. Edward Clarke Lowe

**Dates:** (1838--1912)

### Description

headmaster of St. John's College, Hurstpierpoint 1850-73

### Biography

He became provost of St. Chad's in 1873. He married CMY’s cousin Harriet Coleridge, and brought up her sister Alice Mary Coleridge. [<i>Alumni Oxonienses</i>]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
